warnings: F11 is the largest pile cap seen in this project so far (11 piles, vs house #4's max F12 by pile count naming convention -- but house #4's F-marks denote pile COUNT directly, e.g. F12=12 piles, so this house's F11=11 piles is consistent with that convention, and this house goes even larger with F12/F16 seen on the footing plan S-02/S-03).
F11's asymmetric main bar count (7 top vs 9 bottom) is unusual -- transcribed as printed, flagged for human structural review rather than assumed to be a transcription error.
